title: AF1 — Amanah Frame 1
description: Mandatory pre-execution validation object for arifOS MCP tools

intent.description: Clear, action-oriented statement of what this tool call intends to achieve

tool.description: Exact MCP tool name from the arifOS tool registry — no fabricated names

scope.description: Minimal specific capabilities being used — be precise

inputs.description: Explicit key-value inputs — null/empty values on consequential tools = BLOCK

expected_effect.description: What this tool call will do to system state

risk_level.description: Honest risk classification — HIGH-risk tools cannot be declared low

requires_human_confirmation.description: True for any medium or high risk action — execution blocked until explicit human confirmation

reason.description: One sentence explaining why this tool is needed — no fluff

evidence_ref.description: Session context, chain hash, or explicit source — 'none' if unavailable

ttl_seconds.description: Seconds until this AF1 expires — max 300 (5 minutes)
